_schema.title: string - Dashboard title displayed in the header (required)
_schema.subtitle: string - Organization context line below the title (required)
_schema.backlogUrl: string - URL for the ADO Backlog link in the header (optional)
_schema.currentDate: string - ISO date YYYY-MM-DD for the NOW indicator position (required)
_schema.months: array of strings - 3-letter month abbreviations in chronological order, supports 3-8 items
_schema.tracks: array of track objects - 1-5 milestone tracks for the timeline
_schema.tracks[].id: string - Short identifier e.g. M1, M2
_schema.tracks[].label: string - Track description shown in the sidebar
_schema.tracks[].color: string - Hex color for the track line and markers e.g. #0078D4
_schema.tracks[].milestones[].date: string - ISO date YYYY-MM-DD for marker position
_schema.tracks[].milestones[].label: string - Text label displayed near the marker
_schema.statusRows.shipped: Dictionary of month abbrev to array of item strings
_schema.statusRows.inProgress: Dictionary of month abbrev to array of item strings
_schema.statusRows.carryover: Dictionary of month abbrev to array of item strings
_schema.statusRows.blockers: Dictionary of month abbrev to array of item strings
